item.title: Not everything they do is a performance because it can’t be so all you have to do to look past the performance is find the parts...
item.description:
Not everything they do is a performance because it can’t be so all you have to do to look past the performance is find the parts where they’re not perform#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: That’s just suchhhhh a RANDOM thing to happen, so rly random that clavicular got set up with a literal propagandist for the IDF
item.description:
That’s just suchhhhh a RANDOM thing to happen, so rly random that clavicular got set up with a literal propagandist for the IDF

item.title: This is such an extraordinarily simple principle when you celebrate a racist you are disrespecting their victims
item.description:
This is such an extraordinarily simple principle when you celebrate a racist you are disrespecting their victims. All of y’all who are celebrating and being friendly with and being cordial to an open out homophobic racist are being harmful to every community that he hurt.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They have consistently been using it as a boogeyman to undermine and attack any and all opposition to Israel and then the second...
item.description:
They have consistently been using it as a boogeyman to undermine and attack any and all opposition to Israel and then the second actual real one enters the country. They are suddenly more interested in his influence then his sins. The bar has always been whether you are helpful, not whether you are harmful.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Davidryanspaulding is the peak example of being just grating enough to be a Zionist propagandists and not nearly funny enough to...
item.description:
Davidryanspaulding is the peak example of being just grating enough to be a Zionist propagandists and not nearly funny enough to get paid well for it.
